_comment: Offset index (docs/02 §3): game version -> offset file, plus the detected-version marker.
`detected_version` records which build the checked-in offset assets are aligned to. Version
detection (C4a) selects the matching table for the running game's version; an UNKNOWN version
FAILS CLOSED (docs/02 §3/§7) — the reader never falls back to a stale table, because a wrong
offset silently yields garbage FrameRecords. `update-offsets` (C4b) adds new versions here.
